---
title: "Jiachen Xu"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:jiachenxu1212@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiachen-xu-abby12
---

Hi! I'm Jiachen Xu.

I am currently studying business analytics and enjoy learning how data can support marketing, pricing, and product decisions.

This website shares a little about me, my resume, and selected projects.
